name: Feature request
about: Propose a new rule, checker, or runner capability
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""

## Problem

What gap or risk does this address? If it relates to an AGSSH-STD-001 rule, cite
the rule ID (e.g. `AG-SUP-03`).

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to happen. For a new rule, note its family, profile (Bronze /
Silver / Gold), and how it can be **conclusively** verified (fail-closed).
